plainLyrics:
I'm in fucking awesome poppin' fillies, man, I feel just like a rock star
All my brothers got there guessing they always be smoking like a rock star
Fucking with me called up on old old zing and show up and have their shot stars
When my homies pull up on your blood, they make that thing, we'll got the dot dot
Hey, switch my whip came back in black I'm starting saying recipes are gone scar
Close that doughy blowin smoke, he has me light a fire like a morse song
I knocked the fool of snakes probably leave my fucking show in a cop car
She was legendary door TV, I know we know about her montage
Coconut on the table, lick the porn, don't give it damn, don't you're blabin is a groupy see just trying to get it
Saying I'm with the bear
I see acting not a pocket trying to grab a boom of piss on it, but just in my toilet said hey, he got a man
And they got brought a friend
I'm in fucking awesome poppin' fillies, man, I feel just like a rock star
All my brothers got there guessing they always be smoking like a rock star
Fucking with me calling up on the oozing and show up and have their shot stars
My homies pull up on your blood, they make that thing, we'll got the dot dot dot dot
I've been in the heels fucking super stars feeling like a pop star
Drinking any bad bitches jumping in the pool and I ain't got no bra
Get a friend of bet pulling on the trash and not just screaming now, no more
Hey, like savage, why you got a toilet car go rising you only got this car
I ain't with the cake and how you kiss that your wifey say I'm looking like a host
Green honey, is in my safe, I got a whole wreck, Ellie bitches always that's not what a co-cat
Living like a rock star, smash that on the cup car, sweeten it in the pot, you know you are not hard
I didn't make that hat chart, remember you used to chop hard, living like a rock star
Lладermelon, like a rock star
I've been fucking Punchin', Poppin' Peelies, man, I feel just like a rock star
All my brothers' Got that guessin' they the waste,'ve been smGoodIN' like a rock star
Fuckin' win me calling up on the oozing and show up and have their shotrations
My homies pull up on your blood, they make that thing, we'll got the dot dot dot
